query: Find 10 parcels in Kristiansand municipality that intersect both 200-year storm-surge areas and 200-year flood zones, sorted by teigid ascending.

1.description: retrieve Kristiansand municipality boundary and kommunenummer

2.description: retrieve 200-year storm-surge areas filtered by municipality geometry

3.description: retrieve 200-year flood zones filtered by municipality geometry

6.description: retain only parcels intersecting both storm-surge and flood zones

7.description: deduplicate parcels to one row per teig
